---
title: "Margin Table Direct Class Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        # Should use notefigure for margin tables
        - ['#notefigure\(']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

This tests a table with margin class directly on it.

| A | B | C |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | 2 | 3 |
| 4 | 5 | 6 |

: Margin Table {#tbl-margin .column-margin}

See @tbl-margin for the table in the margin.
